/usr/bin/cc -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_chorus.dir/tests/test_chorus.c.o -o test_chorus  libchorus.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd
